creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
On what hardware are you testing? The vt console bell drives the "pc speaker" which may not be appropriately; on my Framework laptop I get only a click when trying to beep, and the same issue is reported on Linux https://community.frame.work/t/responded-motherboard-capable-of-beeping/1871

You can also try:
kldload speaker
spkrtest
